message:
fix(connectors): correct FCP error taxonomy for sentry, datadog, grafana

Map RateLimited→FcpError::RateLimited, Unauthorized→FcpError::Unauthorized,
NotFound→FcpError::ResourceNotFound instead of generic FcpError::External.
Same class of bug fixed in coda (b8209961). Updates all affected tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
